DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND MARCELO SAMAME'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is off calendar. Duplicate entry. (302/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-09-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Deborah Kochan of Kochan & Stephenson (392.6200) for plaintiff and responding party
Adelmise Warner of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3930) for defendants and moving parties

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AND MARCELO SAMAME'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 4th and 5th causes of action per stipulation. The demurrer is sustained as to the 2nd cause of action without leave to amend. Because Samame is a subordinate, not a superior, there is no factual basis for a claim of retaliation. Moreover, Jones v. The Lodge at Torrey Pines Partnership (2008) 42 Cal. 4th 1158, 1168, footnote 4 plainly contemplates that the only unresolved legal issue relates to a retaliating supervisor. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
